disclaimers: All rates sourced from publicly available information as of March 15, 2026. Rates subject to change without notice.
Promotional rates are typically for new customers/accounts only with specific eligibility criteria.
CDIC insurance covers eligible deposits up to $100,000 per depositor, per insured category, per CDIC member institution.
Some fintech banks hold deposits through partner CDIC member institutions.
This tool is for informational purposes only and does not constitute financial advice.
metadata.data_sources: Official bank websites, NerdWallet Canada, Ratehub.ca, MoneySense, Finder.com, Milesopedia, SavvyNewCanadians

products.promo_duration: 3 months (90 days) - first account only, expires June 9, 2026
products.promo_details: Regular 0.55% + Bonus 4.05% = 4.60%. Max balance $1,000,000 for promo.
products.e_transfer_details: No (online transfers to RBC accounts only)
products.rate_tiers: Flat rate - no tiers on base rate
products.key_features: Interest calculated daily, paid monthly. No monthly fee. No debit transactions. Digital-only account. Free unlimited transfers to other RBC accounts.
products.new_features: 4.60% promotional rate for new accounts (launched late 2025, extended to June 2026).

products.key_features: Basic savings account. 2 free debits/month, $2 per additional. Linked to chequing for overdraft protection.
Free electronic transfers to other RBC accounts. 1 free debit/month, $2 per additional.
No minimum balance. Free transfers to other TD accounts. 1 free debit/month.
No monthly fee. Free transfers to other TD accounts. 1 free debit/month.
Online-only account. No debit access. Free transfers via EasyWeb or TD app.

products.promo_details: Boosted Rate on $5,000+ balance with eligible TD Chequing + 2 of 3 qualifying monthly transactions.
products.key_features: Tiered rates that grow with balance. Boosted Rate for customers with eligible TD Chequing Account. Interest calculated daily.
products.new_features: Boosted Rate feature - earn higher returns with qualifying chequing activity.

products.promo_duration: 120 days from account opening (first account only)
products.promo_details: Posted rate 0.50% + Promo rate 4.00% = 4.50%. Max balance $1,000,000.
products.key_features: Online-only savings. No debit transactions. Interest calculated daily, paid monthly. No minimum balance.
products.new_features: 4.50% promotional rate for new accounts (as of March 2026).

products.promo_details: Base 0.40% + Premium Period bonus (0.20% for 90d, 0.25% for 180d, 0.30% for 270d, 0.45% for 360d) + Package boost (Ultimate: +0.10%, Preferred: +0.05%). Total up to 4.75% for Ultimate Package holders at 90-day period.
products.e_transfer_details: No (self-service transfers to Scotiabank accounts only)
products.rate_tiers: Flat base rate + premium period bonuses
products.key_features: Unlimited free self-service transfers to other Scotiabank accounts. No ATM or POS access. No automated bill payments. Interest calculated daily, paid monthly.
products.new_features: Premium period structure with selectable durations (90-360 days). Package-tier rate boosts.

products.promotional_rate: Up to 0.40% with smart savings tools
products.promo_details: Base 0.01% + up to 0.39% bonus for using smart savings tools.
products.key_features: Basic savings account. Optional smart savings tools to boost rate. Interest on every dollar.
products.new_features: Smart savings tools for rate boost.

products.promo_details: 5.25% for 4 months on first CIBC eAdvantage Savings Account. Smart Interest: extra 0.25% on balances up to $200,000 when you save $200+/month.
products.rate_tiers: Tiered regular interest 0.25%-1.00% (increases with balance). Smart Interest +0.25% on up to $200,000.
products.key_features: Online-only account. No debit transactions. Interest calculated daily, paid monthly. Smart Interest rewards consistent saving.
products.new_features: 5.25% promotional rate for new accounts. Smart Interest feature for bonus rate on consistent savers.

products.promo_details: Base 1.00% + Bonus 1.75% = 2.75% with recurring direct deposit of $2,000+/month.
products.rate_tiers: Flat 1.00% base. 2.75% with qualifying direct deposit.
products.key_features: Unlimited free transactions: Interac e-Transfers, bill payments, direct deposits, pre-authorized debits. No monthly fees. Functions as both chequing and savings. Joint account deposits insured separately up to $100,000 per set of co-holders.
products.new_features: Bonus interest structure tied to direct deposit. Joint account support (up to 3 co-holders).

products.e_transfer_details: No (transfer to EQ Personal Account, then e-Transfer)
products.key_features: Must give 10-day notice before withdrawal. Higher rate in exchange for notice period. Interest calculated daily, paid monthly.
products.new_features: Notice savings product offering higher base rate without promos.

products.e_transfer_details: No (transfer to EQ Personal Account, then e-Transfer)
products.key_features: Must give 30-day notice before withdrawal. Highest non-promo rate. Interest calculated daily, paid monthly.
products.new_features: Notice savings product offering highest base rate without promos.

products.promo_duration: 153 days (5 months) - new clients only, offer ends March 16, 2026
products.promo_details: 4.50% promo for non-registered accounts, 4.60% for TFSA/RRSP. New clients only (account opened Nov 13, 2025 - Mar 16, 2026). Max balance $1,000,000.
products.key_features: No minimum balance. No monthly fees. Interest calculated daily, paid monthly. Free Interac e-Transfers. Mobile cheque deposit. Part of Scotiabank ABM network.
products.new_features: 4.50%/4.60% promotional rate for new clients (ending March 16, 2026).

products.promo_duration: 153 days (5 months) - new clients only, offer Feb 1 - Apr 30, 2026
products.promo_details: 4.50% for 153 days on first HISA for new clients. Max balance $100,000 for promo rate.
products.key_features: No minimum balance. No monthly fees. Free Interac e-Transfers. CIBC ATM network access. Interest calculated daily, paid monthly.
products.new_features: 4.50% promotional rate for new clients (Feb-Apr 2026). $100,000 promo cap.

products.promo_details: Core: 1.25% | Premium ($100K+ assets): 1.75% | Generation ($500K+ assets): 2.25%. Direct deposit of $2,000+/month adds 0.50% for Core and Premium tiers.
products.rate_tiers: Core ($1+ assets): 1.25% | Premium ($100K+ assets): 1.75% | Generation ($500K+ assets): 2.25%
products.key_features: No monthly fees. Unlimited free transactions. Interac e-Transfers. Bill payments. Direct deposit. Integrated with Wealthsimple investing platform. Rate fluctuates with Bank of Canada rate decisions.
products.new_features: Tier-based interest system (Core/Premium/Generation). Direct deposit bonus. Rate adjusted Nov 2025 after BoC rate cut (1.50% to 1.25% for Core).

products.promo_duration: N/A - stable rate that never expires
products.promo_details: 4.00% is the standard rate on all deposits. Not a promotional offer.
products.cdic_details: Yes (via Peoples Bank of Canada, CDIC member)
products.key_features: No minimum balance. No monthly fees. Unlimited free Interac e-Transfers. Interest calculated daily, paid monthly. Biometric security (FaceID/fingerprint). 2FA. Deposits held by Peoples Bank of Canada.
products.new_features: Stable 4.00% rate (not promotional). Transition to Peoples Bank of Canada as banking partner (from Concentra Bank).

products.rate_tiers: Tiered - rates increase as balance grows, up to 3.00%
products.key_features: No monthly fees. Rates increase with balance. Interest calculated daily, paid monthly.
